message:
feat(core): add replay canonicalizer bridge methods and convenience API

Adds compare_mc_traces, verify_determinism, filter_by_domain,
causal_chain, domain_histogram, unique_fingerprints, merge_traces,
time_window, and config/counter accessors. 15 unit tests. (ft-2p9cb.5.3.2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
